title: The Blockchain World State
description: A hierarchical diagram showing how the world state is a derived, global snapshot of all current account data, built from the foundational blocks of the blockchain.
relationships: Blocks contain transactions which, when executed, UPDATE the World State
The State Root Hash is a cryptographic fingerprint of the entire World State
The World State is a mapping of Account Addresses to their current State
The Merkle Patricia Trie efficiently stores and verifies the World State data
